IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO PRESERVE, PROTECT, AND ENHANCE VACATION OWNERSHIP.
IRS990.MissionDesc: THE ARDA RESORT OWNERS' COALITION (ARDA-ROC) IS A NON-PROFIT PROGRAM SPONSORED BY THE AMERICAN RESORT DEVELOPMENT ASSOCIATION, DEDICATED TO PRESERVING, PROTECTING AND ENHANCING VACATION OWNERSHIP. ARDA-ROC IS AN ALLIANCE OF OWNERS, DEVELOPERS AND MANAGERS WHO ARE COMMITTED TO ADVOCATING FOR LOCAL, STATE AND FEDERAL POLICIES THAT ENABLE THE VACATION OWNERSHIP INDUSTRY TO THRIVE.
IRS990.Desc: THE SPECIFIC PURPOSES OF THE ARDA RESORT OWNERS' COALITION (ARDA-ROC) IS TO ENGAGE IN PUBLIC POLICY ADVOCACY AND EDUCATIONAL ACTIVITIES, LEGISLATIVE ADVOCACY, AND PUBLIC INTEREST LITIGATION ON BEHALF OF TIMESHARE OWNERS OF VACATION RESORT PROPERTIES AND TIMESHARE VACATION RESORT ASSOCIATIONS, AND THEREBY PROMOTE CIVIC BETTERMENTS AND SOCIAL IMPROVEMENTS.

OrganizationBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: LIMITED GOVERNMENT FOR A STRONGER FLORIDA
COMMITTEE TO ELECT A REPUBLICAN SENATE

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MADE CONTRIBUTIONS TO CAIDIDATES' CAMPAIGNS.
MANAGEMENT HAS CONCLUDED THAT THE ORGANIZATION HAS MAINTAINED THE EXEMPTION STATUS FOR BOTH ENTITIES AND THAT THERE ARE NO SIGNIFICANT UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS AS OF SEPTEMBER 30, 2018.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A COPY OF FORM 990 IS PROVIDED TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS PRIOR TO FILING. DIRECTORS WITH FINANCIAL EXPERTISE ARE DESIGNATED TO REVIEW AND APPROVE FORM 990 AS WELL AS THE ARDA VP OF FINANCE PRIOR TO FILING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: EACH BOARD MEETING BEGINS WITH A REVIEW OF THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND A REQUEST THAT ANY ATTENDEES IN CONFLICT EXCUSE THEMSELVES FROM THE MEETING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.
